    (value-type int))
    (block-function-body
      (var-def
        (variable v (type
          (value-type int)) (expr
          (index-based-access
            (simple-var-ref a)
            (literal value0)))))
      (var-def
        (variable x (type
          (union-type
            (union-type
              (value-type int)
              (value-type float))
            (value-type string))) (expr
          (binary-expr +
            (index-based-access
              (simple-var-ref a)
              (literal id))
            (simple-var-ref v)))))
      (var-def
        (variable result (type
          (value-type int)) (expr
          (invocation narrowFunc0 (
            (simple-var-ref x))))))
      (return
        (binary-expr +
          (simple-var-ref result)
          (index-based-access
            (simple-var-ref b)
            (literal id))))))
